title: Chain 1/8: Invite Family
scene: 你打电话邀请父母周日来家里吃饭。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 妈，周日来我们家吃饭吧？
turns.en: Mom, want to come over for dinner Sunday?
Sure. What time? Should we bring anything?

turns.cn: 中午十二点，人齐了就行，不用带。
turns.en: Noon. Just yourselves. Don't bring anything.
Your dad wants to bring fruit.

turns.cn: 行，那买点草莓孩子爱吃。
turns.en: Okay. Some strawberries—the kids love them.
Alright. See you Sunday.

title: Chain 2/8: Shop for Ingredients
scene: 周六你和配偶去超市买聚餐食材。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 爸妈来，咱做火锅还是炒菜？
turns.en: Parents are coming. Hot pot or stir-fry?

turns.cn: 火锅吧，热闹，买羊肉和蔬菜。
turns.en: Hot pot. More festive. Get lamb and vegetables.
Dipping sauce? Do we have sesame paste?

turns.cn: 没了，顺便买豆腐和粉丝。
turns.en: We're out. Grab tofu and glass noodles too.
Orange juice and tea for drinks.

turns.cn: 好，再去买点零食给孩子。
turns.en: Okay. And some snacks for the kids.

title: Chain 3/8: Parents Arrive
scene: 周日父母到了，孩子在门口迎接。（对话链：家庭）

turns.en: We're here! We missed you all.

turns.cn: 快进来，外面冷，拖鞋在这。
turns.en: Come in. It's cold out. Slippers are here.
The kids have grown so much!

turns.cn: 是啊，去把水果洗一下给孩子吃。
turns.en: They have. Go wash the fruit for them.
Need help in the kitchen?

turns.cn: 不用，你们先坐，马上开饭。
turns.en: No, sit down first. Dinner's almost ready.

title: Chain 4/8: Cook Together
scene: 你和妈妈在厨房准备火锅。（对话链：家庭）

turns.en: I'll make the broth. You prep the vegetables.
Okay. How long should we cook the meat?
Just until it changes color. Don't overcook it.
Should I add minced garlic to the dipping sauce?

turns.cn: 要，你爸爱吃辣的，单独放辣椒油。
turns.en: Yes. Your dad likes spice—set chili oil aside for him.
Ready. Let's call everyone to the table.

title: Chain 5/8: Dinner Table Chat
scene: 一家人围桌吃饭聊天。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 最近工作怎么样？别太累。
turns.en: How's work lately? Don't overwork yourself.

turns.cn: 还行，项目快上线了，忙一阵就好。
turns.en: Not bad. Project launch is soon. Busy for a while, then it'll ease up.
Are the kids adjusting at school?

turns.cn: 挺好的，老大交了新朋友。
turns.en: Pretty well. The older one made new friends.
Good. Eat more—you've lost weight.
Ha, okay. You eat too.

title: Chain 6/8: Family Photos
scene: 饭后你们拍全家福。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 来，站沙发前面，我设倒计时。
turns.en: Come on, stand in front of the couch. I'll set the timer.

turns.cn: 爸妈坐中间，孩子蹲前面。
turns.en: Parents in the middle. Kids kneel in front.
Three, two, one—smile!
One more. Look at the camera this time.
This one's good. I'll post it in the family chat.
Great. A nice keepsake.

title: Chain 7/8: Video Call Overseas
scene: 晚上你和国外的兄弟姐妹视频。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 听得见吗？爸妈今天也在吧？
turns.en: Can you hear me? Are Mom and Dad there today?

turns.cn: 听得见，他们刚走，今天聚餐了。
turns.en: Yes. They just left. We had a family dinner.

turns.cn: 羡慕，我这边凌晨，刚下班。
turns.en: Lucky you. It's the middle of the night here. Just off work.

turns.cn: 注意休息，春节能回来吗？
turns.en: Take care of yourself. Can you come back for Spring Festival?
I'll try. Tickets are pricey, but I want to come.
Okay. We'll get together then.

title: Chain 8/8: Clean Up Together
scene: 聚会结束，你和配偶收拾厨房。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 今天挺成功的，剩菜不少。
turns.en: Today went well. Lots of leftovers.

turns.cn: 我洗碗，你打包剩菜放冰箱。
turns.en: I'll wash dishes. You pack leftovers in the fridge.
Mom and Dad said they'll come again next month.
Great. Next time you cook the main dish.
Deal. I'll take out the trash.
Long day. Let's get some rest.
